title: BasicNeeds
description: Some basic commands like /gm, /fly /day, /night and some extras.
body:
Hi there,
This is a simple plugin and the first one I have released.
It covers some basic commands such as /fly and /day and some extras for fun :D


This plugin contains these commands:

    /gm <number> or /gm <number> <player>
    /clear to clear the weather, /clear chat to clear the chat
    /day to make it day
    /night to make it night
    /fly to fly in survival mode
    /ping to get your ping
    /UUID to get your own UUID
    /cow (baby) to spawn (baby)cows that explode when you try to milk them

The permissions:

    basicneeds.cowcannon.cow for the /cow command
    basicneeds.bettergm for the /gm command
    basicneeds.fly for the /fly command
    basicneeds.day for the /day command
    basicneeds.night for the /night command
    basicneeds.clear for the /clear command

For the commands /ping and /uuid there are no permisisons, everybody can use them.
